summary: Backend testing for Auth Token Expiry (30 days) and Dashboard APIs bug fixes. All 19 tests passed (100% success rate). Verified: JWT token now expires in 30 days (was 7 days), proper 401 responses for invalid/expired tokens, dashboard stats returns correct data with proper has_sufficient_data flag.
critical_code_review_comments: Token expiry correctly set to 30 days (86400 * 30 seconds) in auth.py line 20
Dashboard stats correctly returns has_sufficient_data=false when no income data in date range
401 responses with proper detail messages: 'Not authenticated', 'Invalid token', 'Token expired', 'User not found'
Dashboard stats returns actual zeros (not fake/hardcoded) when querying date range with no data
Smart alerts and monthly trends APIs working correctly

success_rate.frontend: Not tested (backend-only testing as requested - React Native/Expo app)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo account data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend auth token expiry and dashboard APIs fully tested. Key findings: 1) Token now expires in ~30 days (verified via JWT decode), 2) Missing/invalid/expired tokens return 401 with proper error details, 3) Dashboard stats returns zeros for date ranges with no data and has_sufficient_data=false, 4) Smart alerts and monthly trends APIs working. Note: This is a React Native/Expo app - frontend cannot be tested via browser/Playwright.
